description: Department of Labor news-headline card graphic. The image is a photograph of a U.S. Navy amphibious assault ship (an LHD-type vessel with hull number 6 visible on the flight deck) at sea, viewed head-on from astern, with several aircraft and tilt-rotor V-22 Osprey craft parked on the flight deck and an American flag flying from the superstructure; a second warship follows behind, with a hazy mountainous coastline on the horizon. Overlaid across the top is the FOX NEWS logo and a large bold black serif headline: 'Labor Dept launches multimillion-dollar shipbuilding training plan as US races to close China gap.' A small embossed agency seal appears in the lower-left corner.
notable_text: FOX NEWS | Labor Dept launches multimillion-dollar shipbuilding training plan as US races to close China gap
